evidence: Execution state updated to v7.4 with base commit 7e8540b.

remaining: Test: abort on duplicates, preserve all rows, idempotent, migrate.py discovers them
Single cleaning pass (remove double clean_pages call)
Fragment offset consistency (no strip without adjusting offsets)
Block ID ordering (use dict.fromkeys not set)
Remove duplicate generate_quiz call in quizzes.py endpoint
Strict contract for all paths (endpoint, start, retry)
MultiPlanView: replace sessionStorage list with GET /plans/multi
Unscheduled task title_snapshot and generation fields
Safe delete with execution history check
Add history view for knowledge point generations
Handle generation failure without clearing active list
FUNC-E2E-01 through FUNC-E2E-07: real functional browser flows

defects.P0-01: Migration DELETE may destroy all page data (schema_migrations.py lines 98-114)
defects.P0-02: 018/019 not in formal versioned_migrations chain; migrate.py won't discover them
defects.P0-03: POST /quizzes still bypasses QuizCreationService (quizzes.py line 402 calls generate_quiz directly)
defects.P0-04: V7 E2E tests use isVisible().catch(), manual override, API-only flows
defects.P1-01: Block-level cleaning only removes entire block equal to noise line
defects.P1-02: clean_pages() called twice: once in material_parser, once in clean_document_pages
defects.P1-03: Fragment offset based on pre-strip text; chunk.text strip() makes offsets wrong
defects.P1-04: Large lists/tables not properly split; set() makes block ID order unstable
defects.P1-05: MultiPlanView uses sessionStorage multiPlan:list instead of backend API
defects.P1-06: Unscheduled tasks lack title_snapshot and generation; show generic '未排程任务'
defects.P1-07: No frontend view for multi-plan history or reschedule diff
defects.P1-08: OutlineView regeneration warning says '原提纲无法恢复' but backend preserves generations
